closed_world.value: Isolated cottage in the forest where the ghostly girl lives alone
closed_world.quote: She lived alone in the wooden one roomed cottage...in the middle of the forest

culprit_and_motive.value: Jezzal seeking revenge for her father's infidelity
culprit_and_motive.quote: someone had to pay like her dad had too play for what he had done

red_herring.value: The White Crow book with misplaced family photograph creates false connection to protagonist's story
red_herring.quote: the pictue did not belong there, in fact it had nothing to do with the book.

clue_fairness.value: White rose connects cottage setting to anniversary memory - both elements presented to reader
clue_fairness.quote: there was only one thing that made it like a home and that was a white rose

social_world.value: Traditional family hierarchy with parents delegating childcare to eldest daughter Jezzal
social_world.quote: Don't worry about that I will get Jezzal to do that when she comes down

alibi.value: Father's location questioned when laughter heard upstairs - alibi places him in dining room
alibi.quote: your farther is in the dinning room with the other guessed

investigator_wound.value: Jezzal's isolation and family trauma - living alone in cottage, haunted by family memories
investigator_wound.quote: She lived alone in the wooden one roomed cottage

_meta.title: ebook by daniella willey the black butterfly
